Rep. Byron Donalds ripped into Joe Kent’s resignation letter with three brutal takedowns, comparing it to throwing a hand grenade on the way out the door.

DONALDS: “Number one, I think that it was really inappropriate for him to write a letter like that on his way out the door.”

“That’s essentially trying to throw a hand grenade and while you shut the door and walk out. I think that’s wrong.”

“Number two, it undermines the commander in chief.”

“And I think it

The leading Israeli scholars of the Holocaust and of genocide - Omer Bartov, Daniel Blatman, Amos Goldberg - all agree that Gaza is a genocide. 

So do Israel’s top human rights groups Btselem and Physicians for Human Rights-Israel.

Give it up with the antisemitism smear.

Every time I go online I worry you’re going to show us a personal photo. Smart of you to post a cartoon instead. Funny.


Margot Cleveland (@ProfMJCleveland)







— https://nitter.net/ProfMJCleveland/status/2033991870699729136#m

I know what my grandfather would say about what Kent wrote in his letter. He was a Marine. He fought on Iwo Jima.  He was Jewish. He’d be furious.

I know for a fact Kent leaked to Tucker Carlson a meeting the President had with me, at the President’s request, which Carlson in turn used on the internet.  No President should be treated like that.   Apparently, there were more. Not good. And the appalling antisemitism in Kent’s public letter deserves judgment, which is why so many of all faiths ar

Trump
Hegseth
Rubio
Radcliffe
Wiles

Non-Jews

Go screw yourself

I’m noticing a pattern from all the accounts kvetching over Joe Kent’s resignation….

-Laura Loomer (jew)
-Will Chamberlain (jew)
-Mark Levin (jew)
-John Podhoretz (jew) 

I also notice virtually every patriotic American supports what he said in his letter. Americans don’t want to die for a foreign government…

Curious. 🧐











—

It's so telling that no one in Washignton is even discussing whether to use American or Israeli ground troops. It's just assumed that Israeli lives are too precious and that obviously it has to be Americans who die for this war. And then they tell us they don't work for Israel.

Yep


Chris Loesch 𝕏 (@ChrisLoesch)

Joe is getting applause from the Muslim world and calls @POTUS a liar and a puppet of Israel while also saying it was an honor serving under him… This guy quits his job of protecting Americans from terrorists right when we are in kinetic action against the world’s biggest sponsor of terror? What does his opinion on that decision of the president have to do with him executing his job? I’m disgusted at anyone calling him a hero or brave. This is cutting and run
